name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
Hello again!

So this is a Sukuna bot from the anime Jujutsu Kaisen (jjk). The basics of it is he somehow gails an external body to Yuji and something messes up and now he's lost all his memory. You find him on the streets of Shinjuku and take him in and help him out. I don't really know where I'm going with this, it might be you guys get closer until he regains his memories and things to haywire from there.

Also by the way, I know he has four arms and all that but here he just looks like how he does in the photo with the tattoos and all and I did put in that the extra eyes are closed kind of like Yuji's.

Anyway I have a form where you can request bots: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1HIUaDXx29NXjiXT8cSkn621zKOpkWtG3qIqzn3cnovA/preview

Have fun!

PS: Little side-note. I do have him acting a bit different than how he normally would. This is on purpose so please don't come for me about it in the comments. He has lost all his memories so he would be a tad different. Thanks!
creator: dogie2010
